data.name: The Lust City 2
data.detailed_description:
• Embark on an exotic quest in "The Lust City 2"! Lead your crew through a steamy jungle, unlocking treasures and secrets of an ancient tribe, with many side stories and rich main story with 10+ gameplay hours and more than 10000 renders! Explore the lustful depths of the jungle – where danger meets desire!

    Playable as VISUAL NOVEL or SANDBOX!



  • Your choices matter, shaping the narrative and influencing the dynamics of your ever-growing harem. Will you be a suave seducer, a compassionate confidant, or a mysterious enigma? The power is in your hands to customize your interactions and cultivate a diverse group of companions, each contributing to the rich and evolving storyline.





  • Embark on a quest to unveil ancient mysteries in Sha'wa. Engage in revealing conversations, discover forgotten myths and untold histories. Every word spoken brings you closer to unraveling profound secrets. Explore, connect, and immerse yourself in a narrative where the more you talk, the more you uncover, becoming integral to the tribe's enigmatic journey.



  • Embark on a quest to discover ancient temples and boost your power with lost treasures and artifacts. Navigate your crew, avoiding traps, and uncover secrets for a thrilling adventure where every find enhances your abilities.






  • Ready to explore everything our girls have to offer? Experience over 1000 animations with the option to rotate between angles for each intimate scene, allowing you to choose your preferred perspective



    Gameplay:
    • Sandbox or Visual Novel
    • Sound Effects for Animations
    • Dialogue choice
    • Branching story
    • Scene navigation
    • Scene replay gallery
    • Premium image gallery
    • Primal vision (nude mode)
    • And more..

data.short_description: Embark on an exotic quest in "The Lust City 2"! Lead your crew through a steamy jungle, unlocking treasures and secrets of an ancient tribe. Craft your seductive harem in a thrilling adventure that will leave you breathless.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 日文, 韓文, 簡體中文, 土耳其文, 義大利文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or higher
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X Yosemite 10.10
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9, OpenGL ES 2 or WebGL
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
